# ItemType.Parse method

Decode an item base type from its raw SNO blob and CoreTOC name. Malformed/short records classify as Other (non-equippable).

```csharp
public static ItemType Parse(int snoId, string name, ReadOnlySpan<byte> blob)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| snoId | The base type's SNO id. |
| name | The base type's CoreTOC name. |
| blob | The raw g98 record bytes. |
